basic_info.description_header: Hello, my name is Mehdi Belhadi! 👋🏼
basic_info.description:
After working for 10 years in a factory for a pharmaceutical distributor, a redundancy plan (PSE) became an opportunity for me to rethink my career path.

The birth of my daughter was a true turning point: I decided to pursue a path that has fascinated me since my teenage years — web development and interface design. Back then, I was already taking courses on Le Site du Zéro 🫏 and dreaming of creating my own websites.

At 29, I took the leap and began a Web Integrator training program on OpenClassrooms, with the goal of specializing in front-end development. And this is just the beginning! Driven by a passion for user experience, I’ll be starting a new training course in UX Design this fall to further expand my skills and create interfaces that are even more intuitive and accessible. 💻
